title: Microsoft Docs–style api.json library tree in pckg

source.subject: feat(docs): Microsoft Docs-style library tree for API reference

body:
## Outcome

Microsoft Docs-style library tree for API reference.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`21a7be7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/21a7be7) — feat(docs): Microsoft Docs-style library tree for API reference
